title: The Warden Dimension
description: Ever wanted a warden dimension? Well, here ya go!
body:
# **~~The Warden Dimension~~**

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**_This is a mod that adds another demension. The Warden Dimension._**

  This mod isn't finished, because there is A LOT I want to do with it, which is why the mod is currently in BETA. Full release won't be out for a bit.

  This is a mod, made by me and only me. I am planning on making more mods in the future.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  This mod contains a lot of different new features such as: 
  
  -New dimensions (New one not released yet)

  -New events (Not released yet)

  -New chat responses (Not released yet)

  -New welcome message/short instructions
  
  -New wood varients
  
  -New items
  
  -New armor and tool sets
  
  -New trees
  
  -New biomes

  -New biome music
  
  -New warden features/remodeling (Not released yet)
  
  -New entities (More to come!)

  -New particals (More to come!)
  
  -New ores
  
  -New crafting recipes

  -New music discs (some only accessible in creative)
  
  -New structures (More to come!)

  -New advancements/achievements

  -And more planned remodeling!

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  Biomes:

  -Main biome:

    -This biome is made purely of sculk, and represents the deep dark very clearly, and also has dark blue and dark purple sculk trees. This  biome will carry all of the dangerous things, as well as loot crates. The safe music doesn't play here.

  -Safe biome:

    -The safe biome is a biome made out of blue sculk, with blue sculk trees. This biome plays the safety music that is made as a biome song. 

  -"???"

    -This biome is weird...

  -Giant Warden Forest

    A forest that has giant trees. This isn't safe...

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  Q/A Section:
  
  How do you get to this dimension?

  Just like a nether portal, but instead of obsidian, you use reinforced deepslate! It also has cave sounds instead of normal portal sounds, and also is using ash particles :)

  What is the lighter?
  
  There is a new item called "The Warden Key" that is crafted from reinforced deepslate and deepslate as well in a specific formation. One reinforced deepslate top left corner, one deepslate center, and one reinforced deepslate bottom right corner.

  What is the biome music for?

  The biome music is for the safe biome. It represents safety from wardens. It stops playing if you are in a dangerous area instead of safety.

  Will there be more to this mod?

  Yes! I plan to add A LOT of different things to this mod to make it more interesting and fun!

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  If you have any suggestions, comments, concerns, or you have found bugs and/or glitches and issues, please join my Discord server! 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Author/Main creator:

ZachAftonYT

Creator of ambient music for safe biome and "???" biome:

Chillavali.Jar

Assistant structure builder, main ambient music creator, and music disc maker:

Niko
